Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 13, 2013 is admitted to probate. Victor Levashoff is appointed as the Executor of th estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 10, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Guillory. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Continued To Apr-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
